case_title: CACV OF COLORADO, LLC VS. ERIC CHANG

docket_entries.description: PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD FILED BY PETITIONER CACV OF COLORADO, LLC AS TO RESPONDENT CHANG, ERIC JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CACV OF COLORADO, LLC RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT CHANG, ERIC $10,478.71 PRINCIPAL, $300.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $433.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $11,212.21, - (NO SELF-ADDRESSED STAMPED ENVELOPE PROVIDED; COPY IN DEPT. 302 OUTBOX) - SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
